# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    # Allow frontend service account to access specific API endpoints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/frontend-service-account"
            namespaces:
              - "default"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/products"
              - "/api/v1/products/*"
              - "/api/v1/orders"
              - "/api/v1/orders/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"
    # Allow order-processor service account read-only access
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/order-processor-service-account"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/inventory"
              - "/api/v1/inventory/*"
              - "/api/v1/products"
              - "/api/v1/products/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"
    # Allow admin service account full access to all endpoints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/admin/sa/admin-service-account"
            namespaces:
              - "admin"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "DELETE"
              - "PATCH"
            paths:
              - "/api/*"
              - "/admin/*"
            ports:
              - "8080"
              - "8443"
    # Allow monitoring service account to access health endpoints
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/prometheus-service-account"
              - "cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/healthcheck-service-account"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
            paths:
              - "/healthz"
              - "/readyz"
              - "/metrics"
            ports:
              - "8080"
              - "9090"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  action: DENY
  rules:
    # Deny requests from unknown namespaces to sensitive admin paths
    - from:
        - source:
            notNamespaces:
              - "default"
              - "admin"
              - "monitoring"
      to:
        - operation:
            paths:
              - "/admin/*"
              - "/internal/*"
    # Deny DELETE operations from non-admin service accounts
    - from:
        - source:
            notPrincipals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/admin/sa/admin-service-account"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "DELETE"
            paths:
              - "/api/*"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: gateway-ingress-policy
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: ingressgateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    # Allow external traffic only to public-facing endpoints
    - to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/public/*"
              - "/healthz"
            ports:
              - "443"
              - "80"
